overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit downtown city street at night. The scene features towering glass buildings with holographic advertisements, wet reflective pavement, moderate vehicle traffic, and pedestrians with umbrellas navigating the bustling urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside multi-lane street

events.description: pedestrian with purple umbrella walks past camera from left to right
blue sports car with glowing wheels drives past on the wet street

agents.ego_description: character in red jacket carrying bag walks steadily along the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking with purple umbrella, passes by the camera
blue sports car with glowing purple wheels driving on wet pavement

entered.detail: overhanging roof with fluorescent lighting covering the sidewalk
green painted metal barrier separating sidewalk from street
tall illuminated pink and purple neon signs on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath a covered walkway with fluorescent lighting. A pedestrian with a purple umbrella passes by, and a futuristic blue sports car drives past on the multi-lane street to the left. Neon signs glow in the distance between towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: exits covered walkway and enters open intersection at Grant Ave
traffic light changes from green to red while crossing

agents.ego_description: character crosses the intersection at Grant Avenue while carrying bag

notable_agents.action: white sedan waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: tall pole with multiple traffic signals and crosswalk lights
street sign reading 'Grant Ave' in illuminated red text
construction barriers with orange and white diagonal stripes
distinctive high-rise building with circular windows and red structural elements

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway and crosses the open intersection at Grant Avenue. Traffic lights and construction barriers line the street, while a distinctive building with circular windows rises on the right. The traffic signal changes as the character crosses the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown pedestrian sidewalk with towering commercial buildings

events.description: pedestrian with orange umbrella passes in front of camera
camera pans left and upward to survey surrounding architecture

agents.ego_description: continues walking down sidewalk while camera pans to survey the surrounding architecture and neon signs

notable_agents.action: walking with orange umbrella, passes camera from right to left

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisements glowing between buildings
tall black lamppost with multiple light fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open sidewalk past the intersection, with the circular-windowed building now prominent on the right. Holographic billboards float between the towering glass structures. A pedestrian with an orange umbrella passes by, and the camera pans upward to reveal the rainy sky between the neon-lit skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that transitions from a sheltered walkway into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins beneath a fluorescent-lit covered walkway, passing a pedestrian with a purple umbrella as a futuristic blue sports car glides along the adjacent street. As the character exits the shelter, the scene opens up to the wet asphalt of the Grant Avenue intersection, moving past construction barriers and a building with distinctive circular windows while the traffic signals shift. The camera then continues along the open sidewalk, passing a pedestrian with an orange umbrella beneath floating holographic billboards. Finally, the view pans upward from the street level to reveal the rainy night sky framed by towering, neon-lit skyscrapers.
